chain.thought: Explanation: Count the distinct songs that have a numeric position on any chart. All listed songs except "endlessly" have chart positions, while "endlessly" shows "--" (did not chart). Therefore, 8 songs charted.

judge_thought:
Explanation: The table lists songs and their chart positions. Counting only the Billboard Hot 100 entries with a numeric position (i.e., excluding the one marked “--”), we have:
- “Summergirls” (50)
- “24/7” (42)
- “I Like It” (7)
- “Sunshine” (23)
- “Never 2 Much of U” (61)
- “Romeo” (6)
- “Gentle” (31)
- “Ooh Child” (27)

“Endlessly” is marked “--” on the Hot 100, so it did not chart. That makes 8 charting entries. Therefore, the Prediction Answer of 8 matches the data.
